query:
INSERT INTO headlines (
  userId, serviceId, headlineSetId, formulaType,
  headline, subheadline,
  targetMarket, pressingProblem, desiredOutcome, uniqueMechanism,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  7110001, 1470001, 'rev-hl-001', 'story',
  'How I Went From Struggling Life Coach to Consistent 5-Figure Months Using the Heart-Mind Activation Method',
  'The exact blueprint that helped 200+ coaches build thriving practices',
  'life coaches',
  'getting consistent leads',
  'consistent 5-figure months',
  'Heart-Mind Activation Method',
  NOW(), NOW()
);

INSERT INTO adCopy (
  userId, serviceId, adSetId, adType, contentType,
  content,
  targetMarket, pressingProblem, desiredOutcome, uniqueMechanism,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  7110001, 1470001, 'rev-ad-001', 'lead_gen', 'headline',
  'Life Coaches: Stop Struggling for Clients. Start Getting Consistent Leads with the Heart-Mind Activation Method.',
  'life coaches',
  'getting consistent leads',
  'consistent 5-figure months',
  'Heart-Mind Activation Method',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
